regions.name: top_navigation
regions.notes: Top labels, icons, currency, and state remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: save_filters
regions.notes: Dropdown plate can be generated, but value and explanatory copy remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: save_list_area
regions.notes: Save rows or empty-state text remain runtime-owned.

regions.name: pagination
regions.notes: Prev/Next plates may be generated, but labels, disabled state, and page count remain runtime-owned.
